entry.value: Class: Rule Id/Name: sailpoint-Rule-Practice Action: run in Debug Object Browser by User spadmin

<?xml version='1.0' encoding='UTF-8'?> <!DOCTYPE Identity PUBLIC "sailpoint.dtd" "sailpoint.dtd"> <Identity managerStatus="true" password="Mahesh@123"> <Attributes> <Map> <entry key="displayName" value="Mahesh Yadav"/> <entry key="email" value="mahesh.yadav@sailpoint.com"/> <entry key="firstname" value="Mahesh"/> <entry key="lastname" value="Yadav"/> </Map> </Attributes> <Manager> <Reference class="sailpoint.object.Identity" id="Aaron Nichols" name="Aaron Nichols"/> </Manager> </Identity>
